privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically simulated telescope and CCD environments via KStars and INDI. The target observation object is globular cluster M15 at RA 21.4994h, Dec 12.1669 deg, which perfectly matches real astronomical coordinates. The expected target separation tolerance is explicitly 30 arcminutes. The observation plan strictly requires the use of Luminance (Filter Slot 1), a target output base directory of /home/ga/Images/M15_HDR, and expects specific output files at /home/ga/Images/M15_HDR/sky_view_cool.png and /home/ga/Documents/hdr_summary.txt, all of which are verified through the setup and export scripts.
